JavaScript benchmark tests for array filling, function optimization, garbage collection, and loop arithmetic.


## Files
- **[fill-array-with-numbers-3-times-5000-elements.js](fill-array-with-numbers-3-times-5000-elements.js.md)**: Fills an array with numbers from 0 to 4999, repeated three times.
- **[function_loop.js](function_loop.js.md)**: A JavaScript benchmark test for function optimization using loop and arithmetic operations.
- **[gc.js](gc.js.md)**: JavaScript code for testing garbage collection performance with recursive and iterative object creation.
- **[loop_arithmetics_10kk.js](loop_arithmetics_10kk.js.md)**: A JavaScript benchmark test performing arithmetic operations in a loop 10 million times.
